data.title: This Roper Technologies Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Thursday
SoftBank May Want To Outdo Microsoft With $40 Billion Investment in OpenAI's Latest Funding Round
data.description: ChatGPT parent OpenAI finalizing $40 billion funding round led by SoftBank Group Corp with Magnetar Capital, Coatue Management, Founders Fund, and Altimeter Capital Management as investors, valuing the company at $300 billion.

data.title: Winnebago Stock Climbs On Q2 Earnings Beat, But FY25 Forecast Slashed On Market Headwinds
data.description: Winnebago Industries saw an 11.8% YoY drop in Q2 sales to $620.2 million, though it exceeded analyst expectations. Gross profit fell 21.1% as margins tightened, while adjusted EPS of $0.19 beat estimates. The company revised its FY25 revenue outlook downward to $2.8B-$3.0B, citing market challenges.

data.title: Kosher-For-Passover THC Gummies Are Here: A Historic First For Jewish Cannabis Lovers
data.description: Observant Jews can now enjoy cannabis during Passover with the first-ever kosher-for-Passover THC gummies. Available for a limited time at TokinChews.com.

data.title: JPMorgan, Chewy, Wabtec And A Real Estate Stock: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
data.description: On CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades," Joseph M. Terranova of Virtus Investment Partners named JPMorgan Chase & Co. as his final trade.
